description_long: This is an electric bass guitar with a sleek, contoured solid body finished in a glossy black color. The body features a double cutaway design, allowing easy access to the higher frets on the long, natural wood neck. The neck is fitted with metallic frets and dot inlays, and the headstock is equipped with four tuning pegs arranged in a line, typical of bass guitars. The front of the body displays two pickups, a control panel with knobs, and a metallic bridge for string anchoring. The back of the guitar is smooth and black, with the neck and headstock showing a natural wood finish. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for urban music performances or street musicians.
description: A glossy black electric bass guitar with a contoured body, natural wood neck, and four inline tuning pegs. Features include two pickups, control knobs, and a metallic bridge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glossy black body, pickups, control knobs, bridge, and full length of the neck with dot inlays.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's thickness, contoured body, and the profile of the neck and headstock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth black back of the body and the natural wood finish of the neck and headstock.
description_view_3: Angled view from the headstock, showing the inline tuning pegs and the transition from neck to body.
attribute_headstock_design: Classic 4-inline headstock with four tuning pegs, no visible logo, rounded contour
